permissions.fallback_msg: The stripe-integration skill needs to read local files (e.g., reference docs, asset templates, configuration files) from the workspace. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to write or update source files (e.g., stripe-client.py, webhook-handler.py, checkout-config.json) in the workspace. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to read existing source code files to understand the current integration state. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to create or modify source code files implementing Stripe payment flows, webhook handlers, and subscription logic. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to call the Stripe API (e.g., create checkout sessions, payment intents, subscriptions, customers, refunds, disputes). Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to read sensitive credentials such as the Stripe secret API key (sk_test_... / sk_live_...) and webhook signing secret (whsec_...). Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to read environment variables that may store Stripe API keys and endpoint secrets. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill may need to fetch Stripe documentation or reference content over HTTP/HTTPS. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill needs to submit data to Stripe API endpoints (payments, subscriptions, refunds, disputes, webhook registration). Allow?
The stripe-integration skill requires outbound network access to communicate with the Stripe API and related payment infrastructure. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill may need to execute shell commands to install dependencies (e.g., pip install stripe) or run test scripts. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill may need to install the Stripe Python SDK or related packages via a package manager. Allow?
The stripe-integration skill references external documentation files (e.g., references/checkout-flows.md, references/webhook-handling.md) and asset files that need to be loaded into context. Allow?
